title: Eambrite Set of 2 Small Birch Twig Tree Lights Photo Display Tree with 24 Warm White LEDs Battery Operated Tabletop Decoration for Xmas Home Party Wedding (60cm/2ft)
features: 🎄Pre-Lit Twig Trees: Overall with a height of 60cm and a solid base. The warm white glow of the lights will easily create a cosy and welcoming atmosphere.
🎄Battery Powered: Operated from 3AA batteries (not included). With on/off/timer switch button can be placed wherever you want.
🎄Flexible Branch: Easily bendable for DIY crafting, shape to your perfect look and dress with your lightweight ornaments.
🎄Safe & Energy Saving: LED lights are durable, use much less power and are much safer for you and your family this Christmas.
🎄Elegant decorations: As artificial lights, mini cute bonsai, jewelry holder, night light used for home, office, party and bedroom, wishing tree for wedding hanging cards.
